title: DarkSlayerMC
description: Items are small and cuter. And more advantage in PvP and survival and SMP game mods
body:
Small, cute, and clean items made for PvP, Survival, and Bedwars players ⚔️✨
 This texture pack gives your items a smaller first-person view for a smoother and cleaner gameplay experience while keeping the default Minecraft feel.

[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6745079ac03a882f2b474f8fd21c7e083392477.png)](https://discord.com/invite/DGZTZndxBQ
)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ae341f4272505631ca2cbf3613a68d0030e239.png)

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ac79e392426505792ba3a95edd3951e75d82fb_0.webp)
- ✔ Better visibility in PvP
- ✔ Perfect for SMP, Survival, and Bedwars
- ✔ Smaller first-person items only
- ✔ Default-style look with a clean aesthetic
- ✔ Smooth gameplay experience

Watch the full review on my channel: DandlinMC
[**CLICK**](https://youtube.com/@dandlinmc?si=t3yrxIIq9YIO8sc7)
